title: First Half-Century
headline: 54 — first leather ball fifty
body: A composed innings that confirmed the ability to build and accelerate in the middle order. The half-century came during the SWAT Titan Cup XI leather ball campaign and remains one of the landmark innings of the archive — the first time a fifty was posted in the leather ball format.

title: Career Best — 63
headline: 63 — career best score, SR 133+
body: The highest score in the personal archive. Played for TB Bengal Tigers in the 2026 Tampa Cricket League season. An aggressive, controlled knock at a strike rate above 130 that drove the team innings and set the tone for a new chapter with a new side.

title: Career Best Bowling — 4/30
headline: 4/30 — career best bowling figures
body: The best bowling performance in the archive. In the SWAT TPL Tennis Ball Fall 2024 series, four wickets in a single innings at a cost of 30 runs. The haul contributed to a series total of 7 wickets across 8 matches — the most productive bowling campaign on record.

title: Two Catches vs Allies
headline: 2 catches in a single match
body: Against the Allies on February 19, 2026, two catches in the field contributed to the TB Bengal Tigers effort. Alert positioning and clean hands — the first verified fielding entry in the archive, and a reminder that the all-round contribution goes beyond bat and ball.
